description_long: This object is a small, box-shaped modular building with a flat roof and smooth white exterior walls. The front features a single white door with a security camera mounted above it, and a colorful sign with Hebrew text at the base. One side has a sliding window, while the interior appears minimally furnished with visible partitions and fixtures. The structure is likely made of prefabricated panels, suitable for temporary or portable use in urban environments. The overall design is utilitarian, with clean lines and no decorative elements. The building is compact and could serve as a kiosk, security booth, or small office.
description: A compact, white modular building with a door, security camera, sliding window, and a colorful Hebrew sign at the front. The structure is utilitarian and suitable for use as a kiosk or small office.
description_view_0: The front view shows a white door, a security camera above it, and a colorful sign with Hebrew text at the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a sliding window and a glimpse of the interior, with the sign partially visible on the ground.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain wall with a sliding window and no signage or door.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the side window and part of the sign extending from the front, with minimal interior detail visible.
